eyewear_sunglasses.title: Eyewear Sunglasses Slot
eyewear_sunglasses.referenceBindingText: Treat the supplied sunglasses reference as the strict visual and product authority for this accessory item. Frame identity, lens geometry, bridge fit, temple structure, finish, tint read, scale, and wear position are locked to the reference with no substitution, no reinterpretation, and no drift.
rules: Interpret this slot as sunglasses eyewear only. Do not convert it into jewelry, visor, mask, headwear, or generic face styling.
Lock frame silhouette, lens shape, rim thickness, bridge width, temple geometry, finish, tint read, and overall scale to the reference.
Respect the requested eyewear placement while keeping the product identity locked to the reference.
Keep the sunglasses seated naturally relative to the eyes, nose bridge, brow line, and ear or temple alignment with believable symmetry and contact.
Do not distort eye spacing, nose bridge geometry, cheek volume, brow shape, hairline, or face shape to force the eyewear fit.
Do not float the frames, bury the bridge, clip the temples, mirror the lens geometry incorrectly, or improvise missing frame details.
Keep eyewear influence local to the eyewear zone only. Do not change subject identity, skin tone, expression, or garment readability.
Invalid if frame family, lens geometry, bridge fit, temple alignment, finish, scale, or wear position drift from the reference.

bag_hand_bag.title: Bag Hand Bag Slot
bag_hand_bag.referenceBindingText: Treat the supplied handbag references as a strict visual lock for exact bag identity, silhouette, strap or handle architecture, opening structure, finish, and scale with no substitution, no reinterpretation, and no drift.
rules: Interpret this slot as a handbag only. Do not collapse it into luggage, pouch, backpack, clothing detail, or generic accessory mass.
Lock bag body silhouette, proportions, volume, panel construction, opening logic, handle or strap count, attachment points, drop length, finish, and color family to the reference.
Respect the requested carry placement and keep gravity, hang direction, strap tension, body contact, and scale physically believable.
Do not distort arm length, hand size, shoulder line, torso width, or pose balance to make the bag fit.
Do not let the bag cover critical garment design zones, break silhouette continuity, or compete with the product read.
Do not invent pockets, hardware, folds, or strap routing not supported by the reference.
Keep bag influence local to the bag item only. Do not redesign subject identity, pose class, or garment structure.
Invalid if silhouette, carry logic, strap geometry, scale, finish, or placement drift from the reference.

footwear.title: Footwear Slot
footwear.referenceBindingText: Treat the supplied footwear references as a strict visual lock for exact product identity with no reinterpretation, no drift, and no substitution.
rules: Replace the original footwear completely with the exact referenced product only.
Lock silhouette, strap layout, heel geometry, sole shape, finish, and color family to the reference with no structure drift.
Do not improvise missing details, simplify construction, or restyle the product.
Do not alter garment length or lower drape to reveal more of the footwear.
Invalid if silhouette, straps, sole, finish, or color drift from the reference.

headwear_bandana.title: Compact Head Wrap Slot
headwear_bandana.referenceBindingText: Treat the supplied head wrap references as a strict visual lock for wrap shape, coverage, placement, and finish with no reinterpretation or drift.
rules: Interpret this slot as a compact full head wrap only, not a bandana, loose scarf, soft drape, or generic head covering.
The wrap must fully cover the hair and sit tightly and smoothly on the head surface.
Keep the wrap controlled, compact, and consistent with the supplied references.
No loose tails, no hanging ends, no trailing fabric, no visible knot, and no improvised wrap variations.
No wrapping under the chin and no front drape behavior.
Keep the face fully visible and the neck mostly open.
Do not transfer facial features, face shape, skin tone, hairline, or identity from the head wrap reference images.
Ignore the identity of the person in the head wrap reference images. Use only the wrap shape, coverage, wrapping logic, rear volume, and placement.
Invalid if trailing ends appear, the wrap becomes loose, coverage drifts, hair becomes exposed beyond the reference logic, or the result behaves like a hijab-style drape, scarf, or bandana.

headwear_hat.title: Headwear Hat Slot
headwear_hat.referenceBindingText: Treat the supplied hat references as a strict visual lock for exact product identity, shape, wear position, and finish with no reinterpretation or drift.
rules: Interpret this slot as a hat only. Do not convert it into scarf, cap, or generic headwear.
Lock brim shape, crown shape, material read, finish, and wear position to the reference.
Keep placement realistic relative to hair and head shape without distorting identity.
Invalid if brim, crown, finish, scale, or wear position deviate from the reference.

neck_scarf.title: Neck Scarf Slot
neck_scarf.referenceBindingText: Treat the supplied neck scarf references as a strict visual lock for exact accessory identity, wrap logic, placement, and finish with no reinterpretation or drift.
rules: Interpret this slot as a neck scarf only. Do not collapse it into headwear.
Lock wrap placement, knot logic, volume, material read, and color family to the reference.
Do not let the scarf cover key garment details or alter neckline structure beyond natural overlap.
Invalid if wrap logic, placement, volume, finish, or color drift from the reference.
